command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== PUSH (use vm-memory clean branch approach) ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 bash << 'REMOTE'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
git fetch origin
# Create clean branch from our local main, push as main
git checkout -b push-cleanup-wave origin/main 2>/dev/null || git checkout push-cleanup-wave
git pull origin main --no-edit 2>/dev/null || true
git checkout main
git rebase push-cleanup-wave 2>/dev/null || true
git push origin main 2>&1 | tail -5
git branch -D push-cleanup-wave 2>/dev/null || true
REMOTE

echo '=== POLL JOB STATUS after 90s ==='
sleep 30
PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "import json,base64; print(base64.b64encode(json.dumps({'action':'get_job_status','job_id':'job-20260625T123626Z-725c302a','origin':'test','requested_by':'jose'}).encode()).decode())")
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 '$PAYLOAD'" 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
j=d.get('job',{})
print('status:', j.get('status'))
print('stage:', j.get('stage'))
print('worker_usage:', j.get('worker_usage'))
for ev in j.get('events',[]):
    print(' ', ev.get('stage'),'-',ev.get('message','')[:80])
result = j.get('result',{})
if result:
    print('result:', str(result)[:300])
"

echo DONE_1934
